title: Seismic velocity structure of the flat slab subduction zone in central Chile from wide-angle seismic data
abstract: Wide-angle seismic data are used to derive the P-wave velocity structure of the flat slab subduction zone in central Chile (~29°–33°S). OBS/OBH profiles image the subducting Nazca plate geometry and velocity anomalies related to the flat slab segment associated with Juan Fernández Ridge subduction. The results constrain the crustal and uppermost mantle structure beneath the flat slab region.

Results image the subducting Nazca plate geometry associated with Juan Fernández Ridge subduction and the flat slab segment, constraining crustal and uppermost mantle velocity anomalies.
